set_fields.description: Create extensions/tau/src/forge/ directory with core types and state persistence.nn## Filesn- src/forge/types.ts — ForgeState interface, ForgePhase type, status typesn- src/forge/state.ts — loadState, saveState, listForges, forgeDir helpersnn## ForgeState shapen```typescriptntype ForgePhase = 'implementing' | 'reviewing';ntype ForgeStatus = 'active' | 'paused' | 'completed';nninterface ForgeState {n  readonly taskId: string;n  phase: ForgePhase;n  cycle: number;n  status: ForgeStatus;n  readonly reviewer: { model?: string };n  lastFeedback?: string;n  readonly startedAt: string;n  completedAt?: string;n}n```nn## State locationn.pi/forge/<task-id>/state.jsonnn## Helpers neededn- forgeDir(cwd) -> .pi/forge/n- statePath(cwd, taskId) -> .pi/forge/<taskId>/state.jsonn- loadState(cwd, taskId) -> ForgeState | undefinedn- saveState(cwd, state) -> voidn- listForges(cwd) -> ForgeState[]n- ensureDir, atomic writenn## DoDn- Types exportedn- State round-trips through JSONn- No any types
